description.en: Latvia's staple loaf, rye through and through: coarse and medium meal soured overnight, sweetened just enough with brown sugar and caraway, then baked into a long, dense, dark hearth loaf. Rye has anchored this table for over a thousand years.
description.de: Lettlands Grundnahrungsbrot, durch und durch Roggen: grobes und mittleres Schrot über Nacht versäuert, mit braunem Zucker und Kümmel leicht gesüßt, dann zu einem langen, dichten, dunklen Fladenlaib gebacken. Roggen prägt diesen Tisch seit über tausend Jahren.
description.es: El pan básico de Letonia, centeno de principio a fin: sémola gruesa y media fermentada durante la noche, endulzada apenas con azúcar moreno y alcaravea, horneada luego en una hogaza larga, densa y oscura. El centeno sostiene esta mesa desde hace más de mil años.
description.fr: Le pain de base de la Lettonie, du seigle de bout en bout : semoule grossière et moyenne fermentée toute la nuit, à peine sucrée de cassonade et de carvi, puis cuite en une longue miche dense et sombre. Le seigle nourrit cette table depuis plus de mille ans.

origin.note: Rye has been grown and eaten daily in Latvia for over 1,200 years; historically baked in wood-fired hearth ovens.

ingredients.note: 700g coarse rye meal plus 95g fine whole rye flour used in the sour

yield.shape: long oblong hearth loaf, about 15cm x 35-40cm

keeping.note: Rest 24-48 hours before the first slice; the dense crumb needs the time to set.

method.title: Build the sour
method.summary: Mix whole rye flour, water and rye starter; ferment 10-12 hours until doubled with a bubbly surface.

method.title: Mix the dough
method.summary: Combine the sour with the coarse and medium rye meals, remaining water, salt, brown sugar and caraway into a loose, batter-like dough.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Leave at room temperature until visibly expanded and bubbling, roughly 12-16 hours in total.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Scrape onto a floured peel or sheet and shape into a long oblong loaf.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake hot, then lower the oven and continue until deeply set inside.

method.title: Rest
method.summary: Cool completely and rest 24-48 hours before the first slice.

source.author: Stanley Ginsberg
source.adaptation: Medium rye meal classified under the taxonomy's 'rye' (light/medium) type per grind, distinct from the coarse and whole components classified as 'rye-whole'.
